description: Replace the plain HTML return receipt print with a premium SVG-based bill design matching OrderBillCard
steps: Rewrite components/admin/return-receipt-print.tsx to generate a printable popup that uses the same premium bill design as components/order-bill-card.tsx.

The new design must use: rounded card background (#fffaf0), green (#0F8A5F) accent for the store logo circle and total refund bar, Manrope-style bold typography (use system font-weight:900 since Google Fonts won't load in print popup reliably).

Layout structure: store name circle logo (green circle with white initials 'RS') at top -> store name and address text -> 'Return Receipt' title -> return details (return number, bill number, order number, customer name, date, reason) -> items table (item name, qty x price, amount) -> total refund bar (green rounded rectangle with white text).
Keep the same ReturnEntry type interface and ReturnReceiptPrintButton component API so existing usages don't break.
Use inline CSS in the generated HTML (no external stylesheets) to ensure print reliability.
acceptance_criteria: The print popup uses #fffaf0 background color
A green (#0F8A5F) circle with white initials appears as the store logo
The total refund bar uses #0F8A5F green with white text, matching the OrderBillCard total bar
Items are displayed in a clean table format
The component API (ReturnReceiptPrintButton with entry prop) remains unchanged
